data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: SubscriptionPaymentNotFound
data.value: The subscription payment was not found.

data.name: InvalidAmount
data.value: The amount must be greater than {0}.

data.name: InvalidPlan
data.value: Only Basic and Pro plans are allowed.

data.name: Amount must be greater than zero
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero

data.name: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Monthly amount must be zero or greater
data.value: Monthly amount must be zero or greater

data.name: Payment method must be cash card transfer or yape
data.value: Payment method must be cash card transfer or yape

data.name: Plan must be Basic or Pro
data.value: Plan must be Basic or Pro

data.name: Status must be active inactive or cancelled
data.value: Status must be active inactive or cancelled

data.name: Status must be pending paid or cancelled
data.value: Status must be pending paid or cancelled

data.name: Subscription identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Subscription identifier must not exceed 64 characters
